title: Highlighted Powdered Snow
description: A simple resource packs which highlights powdered snow so players don't fall in it.
body:
This resource pack highlights powdered snow with a bold red X-shaped cross running corner to corner, making it instantly visible and impossible to miss.

Designed for clarity and safety, it helps prevent accidental falls while keeping a simple, pixel-art style that fits Minecraft’s vanilla look.

Features:

128×128 texture

Bright red diagonal cross overlay

Clear visibility in all lighting

Lightweight and performance-friendly

Perfect for survival players, explorers, and anyone who hates falling into powdered snow ❄️❌
